pkgmetadata.longdescription:
terraform-ls is the official HashiCorp Language Server for Terraform (.tf, .tfvars). opencode auto-detects it and uses it to provide diagnostics, hover, go-to-definition, and completion for Terraform files. Works with both HashiCorp Terraform and the OpenTofu fork.
Note: terraform-ls provides only LSP functionality. The terraform formatter (terraform fmt) requires a separate app-admin/terraform or app-admin/opentofu binary.
